_meta.note: String IDs auto-allocated at base + (leader_index * 50) + trigger_index. Room for 50 triggers per leader.

wellington.ToAllyIntro: Hold the line, sir. The rest is arithmetic.
wellington.ToEnemyIntro: I have seen your kind at Vitoria. Discipline will decide this.
wellington.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The lines are up. Let them come.
wellington.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He hides behind stone. A near-run thing favours the prepared.
wellington.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A gentleman is down. Pity — and advance.
wellington.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As expected. Brought up the Guards, brought up the Hussars, and that was that.

catherine.ToAllyIntro: Reason and the scepter, my friend. We advance together.
catherine.ToEnemyIntro: The Empire of the Rus does not negotiate with disorder.
catherine.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Stone walls, like laws, hold the Empire in place.
catherine.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He hides. Even Frederick dared meet me on the field.
catherine.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A faithful servant is lost. I shall have his estate carved in his memory.
catherine.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Order has imposed itself upon chaos. As reason demanded.

maurice.ToAllyIntro: By drill and discipline, my friend. The Dutch way.
maurice.ToEnemyIntro: You have not studied the line. You will learn.
maurice.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The polders flood, the walls stand. The Republic holds.
maurice.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Even stone yields to persistence. Mark his weakness.
maurice.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A good officer, gone. Send word to his city.
maurice.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Volley and counter-march. They broke as drilled men expected.

usman.ToAllyIntro: The sword of the faithful rides with yours. Peace upon you.
usman.ToEnemyIntro: The Caliphate of Sokoto calls all unbelievers to account.
usman.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The mud-brick holds. Kano's walls are ancient, and they hold.
usman.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls will not save a kingdom that has lost its righteousness.
usman.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A faithful martyr. Allah gathers his own.
usman.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The horse of Sokoto rides first, and last. The field is ours.

menelik.ToAllyIntro: Abyssinia greets her friends. We fight together for the highland.
menelik.ToEnemyIntro: Adwa is not yet finished. Come and see.
menelik.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The amba is a wall by nature. The stone is only for the gate.
menelik.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A foreigner building walls on our earth. Let him build his grave.
menelik.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A son of the highland falls. We do not forget.
menelik.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Adwa: the mountain does not bow. The field is ours.

shivaji.ToAllyIntro: Hindavi Swarajya! The hills and I rise with you.
shivaji.ToEnemyIntro: I am the jackal of the Sahyadri. You will see only my shadow.
shivaji.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The fort on the peak. The ridge holds. Let them come uphill.
shivaji.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls on the plain. He has not read his Shastras.
shivaji.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A Maratha falls. The monsoon washes. We strike again tomorrow.
shivaji.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Struck, melted, returned. The Mughal way is not our way.

montezuma.ToAllyIntro: The gods smile on this alliance. Their blood binds ours.
montezuma.ToEnemyIntro: The smoking mirror shows me your end. Come, meet it.
montezuma.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The chinampas float. The causeways guard. Tenochtitlan endures.
montezuma.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He walls as if the jaguar could not climb. Foolish.
montezuma.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: An offering. The sun drinks. We continue.
montezuma.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The flower war ends in victory. As the calendar foretold.

pachacuti.ToAllyIntro: Viracocha sees our alliance. The Four Suyus stand with you.
pachacuti.ToEnemyIntro: You are far from your sea. The mountain will teach you.
pachacuti.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The stones of Sacsayhuamán fit without mortar. As the land itself.
pachacuti.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A lowlander building walls in the highland. The altitude is his enemy before I am.
pachacuti.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A son of Inti falls. The ancestors remember.
pachacuti.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As the Inca hand built Cusco: patient, stone by stone. Victory follows.

napoleon.ToAllyIntro: Soldiers! Forty centuries look down upon us. We march together.
napoleon.ToEnemyIntro: Impossible is a word only found in the dictionary of fools.
napoleon.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Marshal, field fortifications only. The Grande Armée advances, not hides.
napoleon.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He builds walls. Excellent — his army will be delivered to us like pastry.
napoleon.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un officier brave est tombé. We avenge him with French arms.
napoleon.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Austerlitz — surprise them on the flank, and the Empire takes another page.

washington.ToAllyIntro: The cause of liberty binds us both. Steady now.
washington.ToEnemyIntro: We fight for independence. You will find that an unshakable thing.
washington.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Valley Forge taught us: dig in, endure, and the spring brings victory.
washington.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Let him sit behind walls. The Continental Army has time.
washington.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A patriot fallen. His family will be cared for by the Republic.
washington.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Yorktown — patience, line of supply, final stroke. Liberty's logic.

isabella.ToAllyIntro: For Crown and Cross, we ride as one. God wills it.
isabella.ToEnemyIntro: Granada fell. Then Iberia. Then the New World. Do not be the next line.
isabella.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The alcázar holds. No Moor, no heretic shall pass.
isabella.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls do not save those who oppose the true faith.
isabella.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A hidalgo gave his life. He dies in grace.
isabella.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at the Reconquista — the Cross advances, the field is ours.

henry.ToAllyIntro: The sea is wide and the horizons are ours. We sail together.
henry.ToEnemyIntro: I have charted stranger shores than you. Your coast, too, will be known.
henry.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Sagres stands on the cliff. The harbor is walled, the sea is open.
henry.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He walls the land. I command the sea. The sea wins.
henry.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A sailor lost. The ocean takes and gives.
henry.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The caravel returns victorious. New shores, new victories.

Frederick.ToAllyIntro: Always outnumbered, never outfought. We march.
Frederick.ToEnemyIntro: You are neither Austrian nor French. I shall have to improvise.
Frederick.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Bastions, sally ports, covered ways. Vauban's geometry, Prussian discipline.
Frederick.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls delay. They do not deny. Silesia still answers to Berlin.
Frederick.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A Hussar lost. His regiment continues without him.
Frederick.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Oblique order. Concentration at the flank. The Austrian army folds as designed.

garibaldi.ToAllyIntro: O Roma, o morte! With you, comrade, we make Italy.
garibaldi.ToEnemyIntro: I have fought kings and popes. You are no worse than either.
garibaldi.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Risorgimento holds its cities, block by block.
garibaldi.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Another tyrant behind stone. The Redshirts will climb his wall.
garibaldi.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A Redshirt fallen. Italy remembers her sons.
garibaldi.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Mille cammie rosse — and one more victory for the nation.

Gustav.ToAllyIntro: För Gud och fäderneslandet. God and fatherland — we march together.
Gustav.ToEnemyIntro: The Lion of the North is abroad. Kneel or face the Hakkapeliitta.
Gustav.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Stockholm's core holds. The Carolean redoubts ring the approach.
Gustav.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls? I brought cannon. Walls are a matter of patience.
Gustav.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A brave Swede lost. His widow will have the Crown's purse.
Gustav.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Breitenfeld — combined arms, light cannon, cavalry flank. The day is ours.

hidalgo.ToAllyIntro: ¡Viva la Virgen de Guadalupe! Caminamos juntos.
hidalgo.ToEnemyIntro: ¡El Grito de Dolores! Spain will hear us from the pulpit itself.
hidalgo.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: La Alhóndiga stands. The iglesias become fortresses when the Republic calls.
hidalgo.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A gachupín hides. Our machetes do not tire.
hidalgo.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un hijo de Dolores ha caído. The Republic honors him.
hidalgo.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: ¡Por la independencia! The parish rises, the viceroy's men fall.

Hiawatha.ToAllyIntro: The six fires burn together. We speak with one voice.
Hiawatha.ToEnemyIntro: You have not learned the Great Law. We will teach you.
Hiawatha.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The longhouse stands, the palisade rises. The village will be whole.
Hiawatha.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He hides as a weak brother would. The Confederacy does not hide.
Hiawatha.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A warrior has gone to the Great Peace. We sing his name tonight.
Hiawatha.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The circle closes. The Great Law is older than this war.

crazyhorse.ToAllyIntro: A good day to ride together. Hoka hey.
crazyhorse.ToEnemyIntro: You have come to the Paha Sapa. You will not leave.
crazyhorse.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Lakota do not wall. The camp moves.
crazyhorse.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He builds walls. He has forgotten how to fight.
crazyhorse.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A brother rides the spirit trail. Today is a good day.
crazyhorse.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at the Greasy Grass — the cavalry rode in, and did not ride out.

jean.ToAllyIntro: For the Order and for the Faith. We stand together.
jean.ToEnemyIntro: The Turk came to Malta and left his bones. You shall not do better.
jean.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Birgu, Senglea, St. Elmo. Three rings of stone and the will of God.
jean.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls. The Hospitaller knows walls better than any man alive.
jean.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A knight falls into God's hand. We mourn and continue.
jean.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at the Great Siege — the Turk broke, the Order held. Deo gratias.

kangxi.ToAllyIntro: The Son of Heaven greets his ally. The Mandate runs through both our hands.
kangxi.ToEnemyIntro: The Qing do not address barbarians twice. Kneel, or depart.
kangxi.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Great Wall was built for such moments. Stone and patience prevail.
kangxi.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Barbarian walls crumble before imperial cannon. It has ever been so.
kangxi.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A banner-servant is lost. His family is entered in the Imperial register.
kangxi.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The Eight Banners prevail, as the Mandate requires. Order is restored.

suleiman.ToAllyIntro: By the grace of Allah, we greet our ally. The sword of the Padishah is at your side.
suleiman.ToEnemyIntro: I am Suleiman, Sultan of Sultans. Kneel, or I shall teach you.
suleiman.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The walls of Constantinople endure. As they have since Theodosius.
suleiman.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls. My bombards at Rhodes answered walls. Yours will answer, too.
suleiman.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A Janissary falls. Paradise receives him.
suleiman.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As Mohács — the Sultan's shadow sweeps the field. The Crescent rises.

tokugawa.ToAllyIntro: The river wears the stone. Patience binds us.
tokugawa.ToEnemyIntro: Sekigahara decided the matter. You come late, and from the wrong flank.
tokugawa.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Edo castle holds. The moat is deep and the sakoku is eternal.
tokugawa.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls do not stop the patient river. The stone will wear.
tokugawa.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A samurai finds his honor. We continue, as he would wish.
tokugawa.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Victory not by the quickest blade, but by the patient one. As always.

rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToAllyIntro: Grande Armée! Let the eagles fly with yours.
rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToEnemyIntro: Kings have learned my name through their retreats. You will too.
rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Marshal, temporary fieldworks only. We march at dawn.
rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He walls. Bring up the Imperial Guard and the artillery park.
rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: An aide-de-camp lost. He dies for the Emperor.
rvltmodnapoleonicfrance.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Austerlitz repeats itself whenever the Grande Armée appears. Continue.

rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToAllyIntro: Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité! Citoyen, we advance.
rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToEnemyIntro: The tyrant's head fell in Paris. Yours is not so different.
rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Barricades in the rue. The Republic holds the city, and the city is all.
rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Ancien régime walls. They fell before. They fall again.
rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un citoyen martyr. The Committee will carve his name.
rvltmodrevolutionaryfrance.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Virtue and terror have carried the day. The Republic is one step closer to the ideal.

rvltmodamericans.ToAllyIntro: We hold these truths self-evident. And we hold this line together.
rvltmodamericans.ToEnemyIntro: The tree of liberty must be refreshed from time to time. Prepare to water it.
rvltmodamericans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The frontier blockhouse. Wood, powder, and the will of free men.
rvltmodamericans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Tyranny behind stone. A republic will find the cracks.
rvltmodamericans.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A yeoman fallen. His farm shall be honored.
rvltmodamericans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Yorktown — the citizen-soldier prevails when the cause is just.

rvltmodmexicans.ToAllyIntro: ¡Viva México! Con la Virgen de Guadalupe caminamos juntos.
rvltmodmexicans.ToEnemyIntro: ¡Por el Grito de Dolores! You shall hear it from every parish.
rvltmodmexicans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Alhóndiga holds. The church bells rally the faithful.
rvltmodmexicans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: El gachupín se esconde. The machetes do not tire.
rvltmodmexicans.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un hijo de Dolores ha caído. La Virgen lo recibe.
rvltmodmexicans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: ¡Independencia! One more viceroy learns to flee.

rvltmodcanadians.ToAllyIntro: For King and the Canadas, we stand together.
rvltmodcanadians.ToEnemyIntro: The Americans came to Detroit and left with bowed heads. You, too?
rvltmodcanadians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Fort Wellington, Fort Henry. The frontier blockhouse holds.
rvltmodcanadians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A Yankee behind walls. We know this posture.
rvltmodcanadians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A loyal servant of the Crown. His family will be kept.
rvltmodcanadians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Queenston Heights — the militia and the redcoat together. The Canadas hold.

rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToAllyIntro: Pour la patrie canadienne-française. Ensemble, camarade.
rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToEnemyIntro: Vous avez oublié la résistance québécoise? Nous la rappellerons.
rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: La seigneurie tient. Les palissades et les Patriotes.
rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Il se cache derrière la pierre. Les Patriotes connaissent les bois.
rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un Patriote tombé. Son nom sera gravé.
rvltmodfrenchcanadians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Vive le Québec libre! Le drapeau des Patriotes flotte encore.

rvltmodbrazil.ToAllyIntro: Independência ou morte! Marchamos juntos, amigo.
rvltmodbrazil.ToEnemyIntro: O Brasil é um império novo. Você descobrirá sua força.
rvltmodbrazil.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: A fortaleza do Rio guarda a baía. A costa é nossa.
rvltmodbrazil.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Paredes? A marinha imperial não teme pedras.
rvltmodbrazil.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Um súdito leal caído. O Império o honra.
rvltmodbrazil.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Independência. Brasil é livre, e a vitória é nossa.

rvltmodargentines.ToAllyIntro: Seamos libres, lo demás no importa. Avanzamos juntos.
rvltmodargentines.ToEnemyIntro: He cruzado los Andes. Un campo de batalla no me detendrá.
rvltmodargentines.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Los fortines de la frontera. No ciudadelas — solo vigías.
rvltmodargentines.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Se esconde. El gaucho no teme paredes.
rvltmodargentines.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un patriota de la Pampa. Los Andes lo recuerdan.
rvltmodargentines.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Como en Chacabuco: los Andes en la espalda, la victoria en el puño.

rvltmodchileans.ToAllyIntro: ¡Por la patria! Vivir con honor o morir con gloria.
rvltmodchileans.ToEnemyIntro: La cordillera nos separa. Pero no por mucho tiempo.
rvltmodchileans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: El paso del Andes se guarda. Valparaíso es nuestra puerta.
rvltmodchileans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Paredes contra los que cruzan los Andes? Absurdo.
rvltmodchileans.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un huaso valiente caído. El Ejército Libertador lo honra.
rvltmodchileans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Como en Maipú: Chile libre, y el campo nuestro.

rvltmodperuvians.ToAllyIntro: La Confederación está firme. Juntos, amigo.
rvltmodperuvians.ToEnemyIntro: Perú y Bolivia son uno. No sabes qué has despertado.
rvltmodperuvians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Los pasos andinos se fortifican. La altitud hace el resto.
rvltmodperuvians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Se esconde en el llano. El cóndor sobrevuela.
rvltmodperuvians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un hijo del Altiplano. Inti lo recibe.
rvltmodperuvians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: La Confederación vence. La historia andina sigue escribiéndose.

rvltmodcolumbians.ToAllyIntro: Por la Gran Colombia, por la libertad de un continente. Marchamos juntos.
rvltmodcolumbians.ToEnemyIntro: He liberado cinco naciones. La suya será la sexta.
rvltmodcolumbians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Los pasos andinos. Boyacá enseñó que la montaña defiende la libertad.
rvltmodcolumbians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: El tirano tras pared. Bolívar los ha cruzado todas.
rvltmodcolumbians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un patriota americano. Los Andes lo recuerdan para siempre.
rvltmodcolumbians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Como en Carabobo: el llanero, el criollo, el libertador. Victoria americana.

rvltmodhaitians.ToAllyIntro: Liberty or the grave. We walk together, mon ami.
rvltmodhaitians.ToEnemyIntro: I overthrew an empire with enslaved hands. Yours is no harder task.
rvltmodhaitians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Citadelle rises on the mountain. The French shall not return.
rvltmodhaitians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A white master behind walls. The ancestors laugh.
rvltmodhaitians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un citoyen noir tombé. Liberté est écrite avec son sang.
rvltmodhaitians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Crête-à-Pierrot — the free men hold, the empire falls.

rvltmodindonesians.ToAllyIntro: The Java War continues in our time. With you, saudara.
rvltmodindonesians.ToEnemyIntro: The VOC has been here before. They do not stay.
rvltmodindonesians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Bamboo palisade. The kraton holds, the forest does the rest.
rvltmodindonesians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Dutch walls. We know these and their seams.
rvltmodindonesians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Seorang prajurit yang jatuh. Allah akan menerimanya.
rvltmodindonesians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As in the Java War — the mountain, the forest, the guerrilla. Victory of the free.

rvltmodsouthafricans.ToAllyIntro: The Lord is with Transvaal. And with you, broer.
rvltmodsouthafricans.ToEnemyIntro: The Boer does not yield. Majuba reminded the Empire. We shall remind you.
rvltmodsouthafricans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Laager. The wagon circle. Not walls, but will.
rvltmodsouthafricans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Khaki behind stone. The veld knows how to wait.
rvltmodsouthafricans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at Majuba — the farmer shoots true, the Empire retreats. Transvaal holds.

rvltmodfinnish.ToAllyIntro: Suomi seisoo. Finland stands with you, comrade.
rvltmodfinnish.ToEnemyIntro: The forest, the snow, and the sisu. You will meet all three.
rvltmodfinnish.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Mannerheim Line. Trenches, forests, no stone. The terrain is the wall.
rvltmodfinnish.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Stone walls on Finnish soil. Foreign concepts.
rvltmodfinnish.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A ranger fallen in the snow. The forest remembers.
rvltmodfinnish.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Finnish sisu prevails. As always, against weather and enemy both.

rvltmodhungarians.ToAllyIntro: Éljen a magyar! Barátom, a szabadság köt minket.
rvltmodhungarians.ToEnemyIntro: Habsburg-ally or worse? Magyarország does not yield again.
rvltmodhungarians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Military Frontier palisade. Forward settlers, forward defense.
rvltmodhungarians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: He hides. The Honvéd ride past walls.
rvltmodhungarians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Egy hős elesett. Hungary carves his name.
rvltmodhungarians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The hussar wedge strikes home. Magyar steel, as ever.

rvltmodromanians.ToAllyIntro: Prietene, de la Dunăre la Crișana, suntem uniți.
rvltmodromanians.ToEnemyIntro: Unirea Principatelor este făcută. You come too late to divide us.
rvltmodromanians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Carpathian pass palisade. The mountain guards, the palisade closes.
rvltmodromanians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Ziduri? Dar domnia Moldovei a văzut multe turci cădea.
rvltmodromanians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un fiu al Moldovei a căzut. Patria îl ține.
rvltmodromanians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Ca la unirea — Moldova și Valahia împreună, biruitoare.

rvltmodbarbary.ToAllyIntro: The sea is my cavalry and the sun my banner. We sail together.
rvltmodbarbary.ToEnemyIntro: Algiers has no fear of empires. Ask Charles V.
rvltmodbarbary.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Kasbah, the Peñón. Sea-facing guns, land-side mur. The harbor endures.
rvltmodbarbary.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Walls on the land? I sail around them.
rvltmodbarbary.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A corsair lost to the sea. Allah gathers.
rvltmodbarbary.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: The Crescent on the mast, the ports of the Mediterranean in our wake.

rvltmodegyptians.ToAllyIntro: The Nile welcomes an ally. Egypt rises again under our hand.
rvltmodegyptians.ToEnemyIntro: Mamluks learned fear at my table. You are not a Mamluk.
rvltmodegyptians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The Citadel of Cairo holds. The delta villages palisaded.
rvltmodegyptians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: The Nizami Cedid will test his walls. Ottoman method, Egyptian arm.
rvltmodegyptians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A faithful Egyptian lost. The Nile remembers.
rvltmodegyptians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Egypt modernizes. The old Ottoman way bends to new cannon. Victory.

rvltmodcentralamericans.ToAllyIntro: Por la Federación Centroamericana. Unidos prosperamos.
rvltmodcentralamericans.ToEnemyIntro: Los conservadores han aprendido. Tú también aprenderás.
rvltmodcentralamericans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Los presidios coloniales. Adobe y palisada. La federación guarda.
rvltmodcentralamericans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Se esconde como el godo colonial. Lo conocemos.
rvltmodcentralamericans.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un federalista caído. La Patria Centroamericana lo honra.
rvltmodcentralamericans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: La Federación resiste. La causa liberal avanza.

rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToAllyIntro: Desde Alta California hasta Baja. Amigos, adelante.
rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToEnemyIntro: La Californias no se entregan sin la palabra de sus gobernadores.
rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: El presidio de Loreto. Adobe y torre. La misión es fortaleza.
rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Amurallado como un gringo. Poca imaginación.
rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un californio caído. Las misiones lo recuerdan.
rvltmodbajacalifornians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: El pronunciamiento triunfa. California se defiende.

rvltmodyucatan.ToAllyIntro: Henequén y libertad. Caminamos juntos, compañero.
rvltmodyucatan.ToEnemyIntro: La Casta War enseñó a los hacendados. Tú aprenderás lo mismo.
rvltmodyucatan.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Mérida tras sus muros coloniales. Las haciendas fortificadas.
rvltmodyucatan.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Se esconde. El cenote siempre encuentra la grieta.
rvltmodyucatan.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un yucateco caído. El pueblo no olvida.
rvltmodyucatan.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: Henequén, tierra, y victoria. El Yucatán socialista prevalece.

rvltmodriogrande.ToAllyIntro: La República del Río Grande, amigo. Libertad del norte.
rvltmodriogrande.ToEnemyIntro: Mexico y los gringos querían ambos. Ninguno nos tuvo.
rvltmodriogrande.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: El presidio de Laredo. Adobe, poblados fronterizos, milicia.
rvltmodriogrande.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Se amuralla en territorio nuestro. Qué atrevimiento.
rvltmodriogrande.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un republicano caído. El norte lo recuerda.
rvltmodriogrande.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: La República resiste. Del Nueces al Sabinas, es nuestra.

rvltmodmayans.ToAllyIntro: Los cenotes nos unen. Hermano, hermana maya, caminamos.
rvltmodmayans.ToEnemyIntro: Tu emperador es como el sol — cae cada noche.
rvltmodmayans.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: Chan Santa Cruz. La selva es la pared. El cenote es la entrada.
rvltmodmayans.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Paredes contra la selva? Absurdo español.
rvltmodmayans.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un maya caído. Los dioses recogen.
rvltmodmayans.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: La selva oculta, el cenote alimenta, el maya resiste. Siempre.

rvltmodcalifornians.ToAllyIntro: Desde Sonoma hasta Monterey. Amigo, la tierra nos une.
rvltmodcalifornians.ToEnemyIntro: La Californias tiene sus propios gobernadores. Tú no eres uno.
rvltmodcalifornians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: El Presidio de Sonoma. Adobe y bastión, como los españoles enseñaron.
rvltmodcalifornians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: Un gringo que se esconde. Ni ranchero ni californio.
rvltmodcalifornians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: Un californio leal. El rancho honra su nombre.
rvltmodcalifornians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: El pronunciamiento se mantiene. California se gobierna sola.

rvltmodtexians.ToAllyIntro: Remember the Alamo. And stand with us today.
rvltmodtexians.ToEnemyIntro: San Jacinto was eighteen minutes. I have time to spare.
rvltmodtexians.ToAllyWhenIWallIn: The mission fortress. Alamo, Goliad, Gonzales. We know this ground.
rvltmodtexians.ToEnemyWhenHeWallsIn: A Mexican behind walls? Santa Anna tried that too.
rvltmodtexians.ToAllyILoseExplorerEnemy: A Texian gone. Another name for the wall of heroes.
rvltmodtexians.ToAllyBattleOverIWonAsExpected: As at San Jacinto — Santa Anna fled, Texas stood. The Republic endures.
